input:
After all, he was the one given the information which determined its exact spot and selected to dig it. The Quraysh told him that it was the well of their grandfather, Ishmael. It belonged to them all. He could not claim it all for himself. There was much argument on this point. Being a man with a keen sense of justice, ʿAbd alMuṭṭalib suggested that they should choose an arbiter. If the arbiter ruled that the water belonged to them, he would relinquish his claim.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 1: A Glance Back in History

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 1: A Glance Back in History

characters.name: ʿAbd al-Muṭṭalib
characters.appearance: Late 40s, light olive skin, strong build, average height. Thick beard with slight streaks of grey, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Wise calm eyes, strong jawline.

characters.name: Quraysh Son
characters.appearance: Late 20s, light brown skin, athletic build, tall. Short beard, neatly trimmed. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Firm expression, slightly raised eyebrow.

output.moral_lesson: Fairness and justice are essential in resolving disputes.
output.narrative_text: ʿAbd al-Muṭṭalib suggested that the Quraysh choose an arbiter to decide who owned the well. If the arbiter ruled that the water belonged to them, he would give up his claim.

compliance.notes: No prophets present, Quraysh characters shown with modest clothing. Appropriate for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Exterior of a 7th century Makkah mud-brick building. Two Arab men with light skin tones, one with a strong build and a beard, the other with an athletic build and a short beard. Both wearing off-white cotton thobes, brown cloaks, and white head coverings. Standing in a narrow alley, looking at each other with calm expressions. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in the corner. Low-angle shot, looking up at the men. Earthy palette. No modern objects.
